name: Sausage Filled Wontons
recipeIngredient: plum sauce or sweet & sour sauce
recipeInstructions:
To prepare filling, crumble sausage into a large skillet. Add onion and cook over medium heat until the sausage is browned, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat; drain any drippings. Stir in cheeses, marjoram, and tarragon. Mix until cheeses melt.
To prevent wonton wrappers from drying out while working, cover them with a damp kitchen towel. Lightly moisten one wrapper by dipping your finger in water and wiping all edges, creating a 1/4 inch border. Place a rounded teaspoonful of sausage mixture in the middle of the wrapper. Fold the wrapper over the filling to form a triangle, sealing the edges and removing any air bubbles. Repeat with remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy large saucepan to 350 degrees. Fry wontons, a few at a time, until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon; drain on paper towels. Reheat oil between batches. Serve hot with dipping sauce if desired. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 30 wontons.
